    Trading Fees

    Trading fees vary by product and are applied accordingly. You can view the detailed fee structure for each trading type based on your VIP level. To learn more about VIP level criteria and tiers, please click here >>

    For non-VIP users, the fee structure for Perpetual Pre-Market Trading is 0.0400% for Makers and 0.1000% for Takers.

    *Actual fees charged depend on the displayed fee rates applicable to your account after login.
